platform_desc: Intel PTL 4Xe iGPU (4 Xe cores × 8 EU × 10 threads), 2450 MHz, 110 GB/s
config_summary: INT8 (u8 g128, f16 scale) weights, INT8 KV cache (text decoder; GPU plugin default for PagedAttention), audio encoder SDPA in FP16, PA opencl+micro_kernel, end-to-end (audio encoder 1500 frames + Qwen3 text decoder)
